headline: Chipotle Mexican Grill Inc (CMG) Stock Outlook: Don’t Miss the Point
summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill Inc (NYSE:CMG) is one of the best large cap stocks to buy in 2026 according to billionaire Dan Loeb. The Street sees Chipotle stock gaining more than 30% over the next 12 months. On May 4, Argus upgraded Chipotle’s stock rating to Buy from Hold and set a price target of $40. […]
